nasb.text: So David lived in the stronghold and called it the city of David. And David built all around from the Millo and inward.

esv.text: And David lived in the stronghold and called it the city of David. And David built the city all around from the Millo inward.

cnv.text: 後來大衛住在保障裡，稱保障為“大衛的城”。大衛又從米羅向裡面周圍築牆。

ccb.text: 大卫住在锡安的堡垒里，并称之为大卫城，他又从米罗兴建环城围墙。
